name: agristack-krishi-card
description: AgriStack Farmer ID Card Generator - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
